untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern recognition requires structural price pattern identification (identifying two distinct bottoms with similar shape and narrowness, avoiding long spikes/tails). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The pattern requires chart pattern detection logic beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Translated available entry conditions: downward price trend (price below SMA_20 and SMA_50). Exit condition uses reasonable reversal logic (breakout above SMA_20) based on the stated breakout direction of UP. Parameters like 'bottom shape similarity', 'both bottoms narrow', and 'avoid long spikes' are pattern structural properties that require visual/algorithmic pattern detection not available in indicator set.
